title: Splitting the Check Equally Costs You $1,100 a Year
hook: Every time you say 'let's just split it evenly,' your brain orders more — and researchers proved it costs you over a thousand dollars a year.
angle: The equal-split dining trap is a documented behavioral economics effect: shared cost removes individual accountability, driving 30% higher spending than pay-your-own. Most people do this weekly without realizing it.
audience: 25-45 year olds who dine out regularly with friends, coworkers, or dates
key_numbers: 30% higher bill per person when splitting equally vs. paying individually
